The '''KDY-77 repair yard''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] [[Repair Yard|repair facility]] located in the [[Swellen system/Legends|Swellen system]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

At one point the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'' was scheduled for repair and maintenance work at the facility, but was hijacked by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike team during the [[Battle of Swellen]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
